tasks.summary: 3 pages referenced by <docs> tags don't exist: stream-locking, snapshots, perspectives-with-actions
tasks.details: Code has <docs> tags pointing to: (1) fundamentals/perspectives/stream-locking — IPerspectiveStreamLocker, DapperPerspectiveStreamLocker, PerspectiveStreamLockOptions, (2) fundamentals/perspectives/snapshots — IPerspectiveSnapshotStore, DapperPerspectiveSnapshotStore, PerspectiveSnapshotOptions, (3) fundamentals/perspectives/perspectives-with-actions — IPerspectiveWithActionsFor. These are 3 entirely new pages that need to be created.

tasks.summary: IPerspectiveWithActionsFor (deletion support) not documented anywhere
tasks.details: IPerspectiveWithActionsFor<TModel, TEvent> returns ApplyResult<TModel> which supports Delete/Purge actions via ModelAction enum. This is a key feature for perspectives that need to soft-delete or hard-delete rows. Related types: ApplyResult<T> (struct with None/Delete/Purge/Update factory methods + implicit conversions), ModelAction enum (None/Delete/Purge). Code has 10 event variants.

tasks.summary: Snapshot support (IPerspectiveSnapshotStore) not documented
tasks.details: IPerspectiveSnapshotStore has CreateSnapshotAsync, GetLatestSnapshotAsync, GetLatestSnapshotBeforeAsync, HasAnySnapshotAsync, PruneOldSnapshotsAsync, DeleteAllSnapshotsAsync. Used for efficient rewind after late-arriving events. IPerspectiveRunner has RewindAndRunAsync and BootstrapSnapshotAsync methods. Commit 04de3793 added this infrastructure.

tasks.summary: Stream locking (IPerspectiveStreamLocker) not documented
tasks.details: IPerspectiveStreamLocker and related types have <docs> tags pointing to fundamentals/perspectives/stream-locking but the page doesn't exist. Need to create documentation for stream-level locking during perspective processing.

tasks.summary: IPerspectiveBase marker interface not documented (recent refactor)
tasks.details: Commit 3a49ff39 added IPerspectiveBase<TModel, TEvent1...TEvent20> as a unified marker interface for generator scanning. All perspective variants now inherit from it. This is a recent architectural change that affects generator development. At minimum needs mention in perspectives.md; contributor docs in extending/ should explain the hierarchy.

tasks.summary: IPerspectiveFor constraint shown as 'notnull' — verify actual constraint is 'class'
tasks.details: Docs show 'where TModel : notnull' but library code has 'where TModel : class'. These have different semantics (class excludes value types). Need to verify and update docs to match. Same check needed for TEvent constraint.

tasks.summary: PerspectiveStorageAttribute and FieldStorageMode not fully documented
tasks.details: Physical fields page covers [PhysicalField] attribute but may not fully document [PerspectiveStorage(FieldStorageMode.Split)] which controls whether physical fields are indexed copies (Extracted) or replace JSONB content (Split). FieldStorageMode enum: JsonOnly, Extracted, Split — each has different storage semantics. Need to verify coverage.

tasks.summary: TemporalActionType enum may not be documented
tasks.details: TemporalActionType enum (Insert=0, Update=1, Delete=2) exists in code with <docs> tag to fundamentals/perspectives/temporal. Need to verify the temporal.md page covers this enum and how temporal perspectives can specify action types.

tasks.summary: IGlobalPerspectiveFor limited to 3 event variants — not mentioned in docs
tasks.details: Code has only 3 event variants for IGlobalPerspectiveFor (vs 20 for IPerspectiveFor, 10 for temporal/actions). Code comment says future expansion planned. Docs should mention this limitation and workarounds.

tasks.summary: AwaitPerspectiveSyncAttribute not fully documented — missing SyncFireBehavior
tasks.details: AwaitPerspectiveSyncAttribute has: PerspectiveType, EventTypes, TimeoutMs, FireBehavior (SyncFireBehavior enum). SyncFireBehavior has 3 values: FireOnSuccess (throw on timeout), FireAlways (check SyncContext), FireOnEachEvent (future streaming). Need to verify the perspective-sync.md covers all these properties.

tasks.summary: SyncFilter fluent API may not be fully documented
tasks.details: SyncFilter has static entry points: ForStream(Guid), ForEventTypes<T>(), CurrentScope(). Builder chains to SyncFilterNode. Need to verify all filter options are documented with examples.

tasks.summary: Two pages cover PerspectiveAssociationInfo — potential overlap
tasks.details: association-info.md and association-metadata.md both document PerspectiveAssociationInfo. One focuses on strongly-typed associations with delegates, the other on metadata linking. Should be consolidated or clearly differentiated with cross-links.

tasks.summary: Two pages cover perspective sync — potential overlap
tasks.details: perspective-sync.md and sync.md both cover perspective synchronization. perspective-sync.md has full frontmatter and appears comprehensive. sync.md has minimal frontmatter. Need to verify these are differentiated (one may be user-dev, other contributor) or consolidate.

tasks.summary: registry.md missing ALL frontmatter — no title, version, category, order, description, tags, codeReferences
tasks.details: Page starts directly with '# Perspective Registry' with no YAML frontmatter block at all. This means it won't appear correctly in nav, search, or versioning.

tasks.summary: table-naming.md missing ALL frontmatter
tasks.details: Same as registry.md — no frontmatter block at all. Needs title, version, category, order, description, tags, codeReferences.

tasks.summary: temporal.md missing ALL frontmatter
tasks.details: No frontmatter block. Needs title, version, category, order, description, tags, codeReferences (should reference ITemporalPerspectiveFor.cs, TemporalActionType.cs).

tasks.summary: typed-associations.md missing ALL frontmatter
tasks.details: No frontmatter block. Needs all fields.

tasks.summary: physical-fields.md missing order, description, tags, codeReferences
tasks.details: Has title and version/category but missing navigational and search fields. codeReferences should point to PhysicalFieldAttribute.cs, PerspectiveStorageAttribute.cs, FieldStorageMode.cs. Tags should include: 'physical columns, database indexing, JSONB, extracted fields, split storage, B-tree index'.

tasks.summary: vector-fields.md missing order, description, tags, codeReferences
tasks.details: Has title/version/category. Missing: codeReferences to VectorFieldAttribute.cs, VectorDistanceMetric.cs, VectorIndexType.cs. Tags should include: 'pgvector, embeddings, similarity search, cosine distance, HNSW, IVFFlat, vector search, ML embeddings'.

tasks.summary: polymorphic-discriminator.md missing order, description, tags, codeReferences
tasks.details: Has title/version/category. Missing codeReferences to PolymorphicDiscriminatorAttribute.cs. Tags should include: 'polymorphic, discriminator, JsonPolymorphic, type hierarchy, indexed column, type filter'.

tasks.summary: Code samples have auto-generated poor metadata
tasks.details: All code samples in perspectives.md have description='Demonstrates X' pattern and garbage tags. Same issue found across all perspectives pages. Affects ~30+ code samples total across the section.

tasks.summary: MustExistAttribute not documented in perspectives section
tasks.details: MustExistAttribute<docs> tag points to extending/attributes/must-exist. Need to verify that page exists and cross-link from perspectives.md. The attribute causes the generator to insert a null-check before Apply — throws if model is null on an update event.

tasks.summary: WhizbangPerspectiveAttribute (multi-context routing) may not be documented
tasks.details: WhizbangPerspectiveAttribute(params string[] keys) routes perspectives to specific DbContexts by key. Need to verify this is covered in perspectives.md or in the configuration docs.

tasks.summary: PerspectiveRunnerCallbackRegistry (AOT module initializer pattern) not documented
tasks.details: PerspectiveRunnerCallbackRegistry.RegisterCallback/InvokeRegistration enables AOT-compatible DI registration from multiple assemblies. This is an advanced topic but important for multi-assembly deployments.

tasks.summary: IPerspectiveBase refactor needs contributor documentation
tasks.details: The IPerspectiveBase marker interface hierarchy (commit 3a49ff39) affects all 7 generators. Contributors need to understand: why it exists, how the inheritance chain works (IPerspectiveFor → IPerspectiveBase<TModel, TEvents>), and which generators check WithActionsFor compatibility. Should be in extending/internals/ or extending/source-generators/.

sectionSummary: The perspectives section has 16 content pages covering a large feature surface. The biggest issues are: (1) 3 pages referenced by <docs> tags don't exist (stream-locking, snapshots, perspectives-with-actions), (2) IPerspectiveWithActionsFor with ApplyResult<T>/ModelAction (deletion support) is entirely undocumented, (3) 4 pages have NO frontmatter at all (registry, table-naming, temporal, typed-associations), (4) 7 more pages have partial frontmatter gaps, (5) IPerspectiveBase marker interface (recent refactor) not documented. The existing pages are generally well-written with good conceptual coverage. The rebuild.md page correctly shows the updated RebuildPerspectiveCommand signature (unlike lifecycle.md and routing.md). The sync infrastructure (32 files) is covered by perspective-sync.md and event-completion.md but there may be overlap with sync.md. Code sample metadata is universally poor across all pages.
